mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bookings ( user_id, vehicle_id, shop_id, technician_id, appointment_datetime, service_types, description, estimated_duration, status, priority, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{vehicleId}, #{shopId}, #{technicianId}, #{appointmentDateTime}, #{serviceTypes}, #{description}, #{estimatedDuration}, #{status}, #{priority}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, vehicle_id, shop_id, technician_id, appointment_datetime, service_types, description, estimated_duration, status, priority, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM bookings WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT id, user_id, vehicle_id, shop_id, technician_id, appointment_datetime, service_types, description, estimated_duration, status, priority, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM bookings WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY appointment_datetime DESC LIMIT #{page.size} OFFSET #{page.offset}

SELECT id, user_id, vehicle_id, shop_id, technician_id, appointment_datetime, service_types, description, estimated_duration, status, priority, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM bookings WHERE shop_id = #{shopId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY appointment_datetime ASC LIMIT #{page.size} OFFSET #{page.offset}

SELECT id, user_id, vehicle_id, shop_id, technician_id, appointment_datetime, service_types, description, estimated_duration, status, priority, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM bookings WHERE technician_id = #{technicianId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY appointment_datetime ASC LIMIT #{page.size} OFFSET #{page.offset}

SELECT id, user_id, vehicle_id, shop_id, technician_id, appointment_datetime, service_types, description, estimated_duration, status, priority, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM bookings WHERE status = #{status} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY appointment_datetime ASC LIMIT #{page.size} OFFSET #{page.offset}

SELECT id, user_id, vehicle_id, shop_id, technician_id, appointment_datetime, service_types, description, estimated_duration, status, priority, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM bookings WHERE appointment_datetime BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY appointment_datetime ASC LIMIT #{page.size} OFFSET #{page.offset}

SELECT id, user_id, vehicle_id, shop_id, technician_id, appointment_datetime, service_types, description, estimated_duration, status, priority, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM bookings WHERE shop_id = #{shopId} AND DATE(appointment_datetime) = DATE(#{appointmentDate}) AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY appointment_datetime ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE bookings SET vehicle_id = #{vehicleId}, shop_id = #{shopId}, technician_id = #{technicianId}, appointment_datetime = #{appointmentDateTime}, service_types = #{serviceTypes}, description = #{description}, estimated_duration = #{estimatedDuration}, status = #{status}, priority = #{priority}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE bookings SET status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE bookings SET technician_id = #{technicianId}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bookings WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bookings WHERE shop_id = #{shopId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bookings WHERE status = #{status} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT id, user_id, vehicle_id, shop_id, technician_id, appointment_datetime, service_types, description, estimated_duration, status, priority, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM bookings WHERE DATE(appointment_datetime) = CURRENT_DATE AND deleted_at IS NULL AND shop_id = #{shopId} ORDER BY appointment_datetime ASC

SELECT id, user_id, vehicle_id, shop_id, technician_id, appointment_datetime, service_types, description, estimated_duration, status, priority, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM bookings WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND appointment_datetime > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AND deleted_at IS NULL AND status NOT IN ('CANCELLED', 'NO_SHOW', 'COMPLETED') ORDER BY appointment_datetime ASC LIMIT #{page.size} OFFSET #{page.offset}

SELECT id, user_id, vehicle_id, shop_id, technician_id, appointment_datetime, service_types, description, estimated_duration, status, priority, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM bookings WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'COMPLETED' AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY appointment_datetime DESC LIMIT #{page.size} OFFSET #{page.offset}
